# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

This project exists to encourage learning, collaboration, and professional growth within the cybersecurity community.

Everyone is welcome regardless of background, experience level, gender, race, religion, nationality, or identity.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful
- Assume good intent
- Help others learn
- Accept constructive criticism
- Keep discussions technical and professional

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment
- Personal attacks
- Hate speech
- Spam
- Plagiarism
- Promotion of malicious activity

## Enforcement

Project maintainers reserve the right to remove inappropriate comments, issues, pull requests, or contributors that violate these guidelines.
